Southeast Asian Countries

A concise list of countries located in Southeast Asia.

  • Brunei Darussalam

    Small sovereign state on the island of Borneo.

  • Cambodia

    Known for the Angkor archaeological park and Khmer culture.

  • Indonesia

    Largest archipelagic country, spans thousands of islands.

  • Laos

    Landlocked nation known for mountainous terrain and Mekong River.

  • Malaysia

    Consists of Peninsular Malaysia and parts of Borneo.

  • Myanmar

    Large country with diverse cultures and landscapes.

  • Philippines

    Archipelago in the western Pacific with many islands.

  • Singapore

    City-state and global financial hub at the tip of Malay Peninsula.

  • Thailand

    Famous for its beaches, cuisine, and historic temples.

  • Vietnam

    Long coastline on the South China Sea with rich history.

  • Timor-Leste (East Timor)

    Young nation in Maritime Southeast Asia, east of Indonesia.

Source: United Nations & regional references
